data.description: 1.8.0, the first release of the Holiday Update, is a major update to Bedrock Edition and the first experimental release for Village & Pillage, released on December 11, 2018. It adds Village & Pillage features including pandas, bamboo, scaffolding, crossbows, and cats as a separate mob from ocelots, and more. This is the final version released in 2018, except for the Nintendo Switch.
